summary: Location data for FDNY firehouses including latitude, longitude, census tract, and community board assignments. Covers all fire station facilities across NYC's five boroughs.
Active dog license records from NYC's DOHMH Dog Licensing System, including animal gender, breed, birth year, owner zip code, and license issuance and expiration dates.
NYC property assessment data for tax classes 1-4, including market and assessed values, exemptions, abatements, and building characteristics used to calculate property tax bills.
NYC Department of Finance property valuations including assessed value of land and total property, building address, borough, and tax class designations used for property tax calculations.
Historical traffic volume counts collected by NYC DOT Automated Traffic Recorders at bridge crossings and roadways, with hourly count breakdowns across a 24-hour period.
Annual NYC property tax rates broken down by tax class (1 through 4) with year-over-year historical rate data from the Department of Finance.
NYC reported dog bite incidents including breed, age, date of bite, zip code, borough, species, gender, and spay/neuter status as reported to the Health Department.
Building permit records from NYC's Buildings Information System, including permit type, subtype, status, issuance and expiration dates, and application job type by BIN.
Harbor water quality sampling data from NYC DEP including enterococcus levels, fluorometer readings, PAR measurements, sample depth, and weather conditions at collection sites.
Real-time NYC DOT traffic speed data including travel time, speed, borough, link name, and encoded polyline for road segments monitored by the TRANSCOM system.
Records of FDNY members killed in the line of duty, including rank, name, unit assignment, and date of death.
Locations of NYC voting and poll sites including street address, site number, voter and handicap entrance details, zip code, and latitude/longitude coordinates.
Contact directory for NYC Department of Homeless Services departments, including phone numbers, borough, latitude/longitude, and neighborhood tabulation area for each office.
NYC HPD order to repair and vacate orders with details on building ID, number of vacated units, vacate type, vacate effective date, and geographic identifiers including BBL and census tract.
Hours and locations of Queens Library branches including address, community board, police precinct, and borough for each of the library's branch locations.
Historical TLC driver license application status data including completion status of WAV course, defensive driving, drug test, driver exam, and medical clearance requirements.
2014-2015 NYC high school directory with school-level data on total students, borough, grade spans, extracurricular activities, partnerships, and overview descriptions.
NYPD personnel demographics listing member type (uniform/civilian), gender, race, years on job, and appointment date for active members of service.
NYC storefront vacancy reports submitted by property owners under Local Law 157, including BBL, BIN, borough, filing due date, lease expiration, and vacancy status.
NYC property tax abatement detail records including abatement percentage, eligible amount, tax year, prior year limits, and preconstruction tax values by property parcel.
List of city vehicles to be auctioned by NYC DCAS, including VIN, year, make, model, and auction close date.
Metal content test results for consumer products tested by NYC Health Department, including product name, type, manufacturer, country of origin, metal type, and concentration levels.
NYC property charge balance records by period, including account type, payment begin date, grace date, transaction count, and summary of charges by parcel ID.
NYC citywide rolling calendar property sales data including neighborhood, zip code, building class, tax class, land square footage, residential units, and sale price.
Directory of NYC community-based organizations offering volunteer opportunities, with location, organization name, website, and community board for each entry.
2019-2020 NYC school location data including principal contact, network superintendent, support leader names, fiscal year, census tract, and geographic district codes.
NYC hotel property listings within the five boroughs including BIN, borough code, street number, tax year, community board, PARID, and council district.
Directory of public park toilet facilities including location, name, borough, handicap accessibility status, and whether the facility is open year-round.
NYC sidewalk dismissal inspection tracking records for property owners who repaired sidewalks privately, including permit number, attempt number, borough, council district, and BBL.
NYCHA residential address list including street, lot, BIN, stairhall number, city, latitude, longitude, and neighborhood tabulation area code for each residential unit.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2009, including incident address, borough, agency, facility type, and geographic coordinates. Historical data, not updated.
NYC Department of Finance property exemption classification codes with descriptions, legal references, SDEA codes, status, and update dates for each exemption category.
NYC school cafeteria inspection records from 2020 to present, including violation descriptions, level, site type, borough, council district, and NTA for each inspection.
Records of non-natural deaths of inmates in NYC Department of Correction custody, including incident ID, type, facility, and reported date.
Self-reported drinking water tank inspection results for NYC buildings, including structure condition, overflow pipe compliance, biological growth, air vent status, and debris/insect findings.
Geographic data for NYC park play areas including park name, borough, GIS property number, and shape area and length measurements.
2017-2018 NYC school location data with census tract, fiscal year, borough boundaries, zip codes, police precinct, city council districts, and school support team information.
Locations of GED Plus program sites across NYC, including address, borough, program site name, BIN, census tract, and community board for each site.
Historical NYC benefits and programs API data including program eligibility, how to apply online or in person, government agency, office locations, and program codes.
NYC DOE borough enrollment office locations with hours, phone numbers, districts served, postcode, BIN, council district, and census tract for each office.
List of NYC DEP-certified asbestos investigators including first name, last name, certification number, telephone, and certificate expiration date.
Monthly counts of HRA-administered Medicaid enrollees broken down by category including cash assistance, supplemental security income, nursing home, and medical assistance only.
Annual NYC civil service exam schedule listing examination titles, numbers, open competitive or promotion type, and application period start and end dates for each fiscal year.
2016 NYC DOE high school directory with school sports, accessibility description, extracurricular activities, community board partnerships, campus name, and state code.
Geographic boundaries of NYPD police precincts as GIS shapefiles, including precinct number, shape area, and shape length. Version 26a.
Energy usage data for DCAS-managed city buildings including fiscal year 2015 energy usage in MMBTU (excluding fuel oil), building name, address, BIN, borough, and census tract.
2017-2018 school crime data reported by NYPD including criminal, violent, property, and other incident counts by school with address and DBN identifiers.
NYC property assessment change records tracking value changes to assessments and exemptions, including change type, period, exemption code, and land and building value change amounts.
Listing of Latin cultural organizations in NYC including company description, business type, borough, location address, council district, zip code, and community district.
NYC DEP at-the-tap water samples tested for lead and copper, with separate readings for first draw, 1-2 minute flush, and 5-minute flush by zip code, borough, and collection date.
Active NYC School Construction Authority RFP listings including solicitation number, services requested, department, due date, not-to-exceed award amount, and number of contracts.
NYC Law Department civil litigation case data including matter name, court name, judge, division, plaintiff/petitioner firms, total city received amount, total expenses, and disposition.
2019 high-volume for-hire vehicle trip records from TLC including pickup and dropoff datetime, location IDs, dispatching base number, and HVFHS license number.
NYC DOF property assessment data for tax classes 2-4, including current full value of land, assessed values, exemption fields, condo status, and appraisal time.
NYCHA resident job preparation and training programs with program name, description, eligibility requirements, locations, and contact information.
NYC Clean Heat dataset tracking building boiler information including BBL, BIN, address, borough, number of floors, and number of identical boilers.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2004, including incident zip, agency, facility type, borough, taxi pick-up location, and state plane coordinates. Historical data, not updated.
Historical NYC school cafeteria inspection records including violation code, description, level, street, borough code, city, and last inspection date.
2013-2014 NYC DOE high school directory with printed name, phone and fax numbers, alphabetic name, bus and subway routes, community board, and primary address.
School-level NYC Regents exam results from 2014-15 to 2016-17, including mean score, percent scoring 65+ and 80+ above, total tested, school type, year, and demographic category.
NYC DOF property assessment data for tax class 1, including owner name, land area, acreage, building depth, tax class, year built, and assessment limit fields.
2021-2022 NYC school guidance counselors and social workers data including full-time, part-time, bilingual, and ATR counts, plus enrollment and single shepherd designations by school.
Listing of Latin media organizations in NYC including location, city, BIN, census tract, NTA, community district, longitude, BBL, and council district.
NYC DEP compliance at-the-tap lead and copper test results including first draw lead and copper levels, collection and receipt dates, kit ID, zip code, and borough.
NYC DSNY garage locations including zip code, city, district code, borough, object ID, type, and BBL for all 59 sanitation department garages across the five boroughs.
NYC DEP work orders associated with CSR complaints, including work order number, activity code and description, timestamps for added, started, and completed status.
NYC sidewalk program written correspondence records tracking complaints and expedite requests, including address, block, lot, BBL, date received, violation type, and community board.
2013-2014 NYC high school performance data including graduation rates, college readiness, student progress scores, and quality review scores across multiple school years.
Monthly HIV/AIDS Services Administration (HASA) report with case counts by borough, race/ethnicity, and housing type including NYCHA, scatter site, transitional, and rental assistance.
NYC DEP citywide catch basin locations with latitude, longitude, point coordinates, borough, and unit ID for basins in the city's 7,500-mile sewer network.
2021-2022 NYC community schools listing with school name, DBN, grades served, building code, and lead community-based organization partner.
NYC election district poll site locations with election district number, site number, borough, and assembly district designations.
SNAP Program Access Index participation rates comparing NYC and US figures by year, based on USDA national PAI dataset methodology.
Geographic boundaries of NYPD patrol sectors with sector code, precinct, NCO phase indicator, patrol borough, and square mileage.
NYC Department of Correction records of violent inmate-on-inmate fight incidents, including incident ID, date, and facility.
NYC DOE pre-K rider counts by transportation site, including site name, school name, OPT code, school year, and number of riders.
NYC FY2013 Mayor's Management Report agency performance indicators with raw values, format type, agency, indicator name, sub-indicator, and value percentages.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2008, including agency, facility type, community board, borough, city, park name, and resolution action date. Historical data.
Historical fuel usage data for DCAS-managed city buildings including building address, BIN, borough, council district, block, and NTA.
List of 2010 local film festivals in NYC including festival name, website URL, and date.
Manhattan Borough President tourism grant records including organization name, project title, funded amount, borough, BBL, census tract, NTA, and community board.
NYC Department of Cultural Affairs capital project funding awards by organization, including DCLA funding, city council funding, borough president funding, total funding, and fiscal year.
Directory of NYC cable service providers by location, including cable provider name, website, postcode, city, state, council district, borough, and community board.
NYC public library branch locations from the New York Public Library system, including name, house number, street name, zip code, system, and geographic coordinates.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2005, including borough, location, school information, bridge highway segments, and ferry terminal details. Historical data.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2006, including created date, unique key, longitude, school and bridge highway information, and ferry terminal names. Historical data.
NYC volunteer opportunities directory with organization names, category descriptions, street addresses, community board, NTA, city, postcode, and website for each organization.
NYC school demographic data on diversity efforts for 2015-2016, including activity category, target population, grade band, and description of each diversity initiative.
2016 NYC high school performance directory with graduation rate, college career rate, on-track percentages, quality review scores, and student satisfaction measures by school.
All 311 service requests submitted in 2007, including created date, street name, latitude, school code, resolution action date, and ferry terminal information. Historical data.
NYCHA special events hosted for residents including event title, location, start time, and recurrence schedule for children's, senior, and community events.
NYC Department of Probation office locations by borough with address, BIN, latitude, longitude, postcode, NTA, census tract, community board, and disposition type.
Manhattan community garden site data including community board, census tract, borough, BBL, BIN, longitude, latitude, postcode, and contact information for each garden.
2018-2020 CLASS and ECERS-R early childhood classroom observation data including emotional support, classroom organization, instructional support, and ECERS-R subscale scores by site.
NYC election campaign contribution records including donor city, match amount, intermediary occupation, employer city, committee name, candidate first name, and contribution code.
NYC museum location directory including name, address, telephone, URL, zip code, and geographic coordinates for museums across the five boroughs.
NYC school capacity projects by school including address, funding requested for FY25-29, previous appropriations, total estimated completion cost, council district, sited status, and BBL.
2011-2012 NYC family guide listings with guide name, language, grade level, and link for family resources distributed by the Department of Education.
NYC Department of Design and Construction active project list including project ID, description, client agency, phase, scope, status, and projected construction completion date.
2021 NYC School Survey parent response data for pre-K through grade 12, with agree/disagree responses to questions about school communication, trust in leadership, and student belonging.
